title: taraxacum pholidocarpum
intro: Taraxacum pholidocarpum is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae), specifically a type of dandelion native to China. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Taraxacum pholidocarpum are believed to include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Taraxacum pholidocarpum can be prepared as herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is sometimes used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
